name: public_health_model_based_triage_tool_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health model based triage tool millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Inez Patel
agents.identity: I am Inez Patel, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Hughes
agents.identity: I am Elliot Hughes, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so equality does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so liberty does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Inez Patel must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Inez Patel do?
